ddls:
CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "experiment_name" TEXT /* Name of the experiment */,
  "experiment_date" TEXT /* Date when the experiment was conducted */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher conducting the experiment */,
  "treatment_type" TEXT /* Type of treatment applied during the experiment */,
  "reagent_concentration" REAL /* Concentration of the reagent used in the experiment */,
  "ionic_strength" REAL /* Ionic strength of the solution used in the experiment */,
  "experiment_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the experiment */,
  "sample_identifier" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the biological sample used in the experiment */,
  "instrument_id" TEXT /* ID of the instrument used to conduct the experiment */,
  "experiment_version" INTEGER /* Version of the experiment */,
  "data_entry_method" TEXT /* Method of data entry (manual or automated) */,
  "experimental_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "intensity_readings" (
  "reading_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each intensity reading */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the experiment associated with the readings */,
  "reading_time" TEXT /* Time at which the intensity reading was taken */,
  "condition_identifier" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the experimental condition */,
  "intensity_1" REAL /* Intensity reading for condition 1 */,
  "intensity_2" REAL /* Intensity reading for condition 2 */,
  "intensity_3" REAL /* Intensity reading for condition 3 */,
  "intensity_4" REAL /* Intensity reading for condition 4 */,
  "intensity_5" REAL /* Intensity reading for condition 5 */,
  "intensity_6" REAL /* Intensity reading for condition 6 */,
  "intensity_7" REAL /* Intensity reading for condition 7 */,
  "intensity_8" REAL /* Intensity reading for condition 8 */,
  "intensity_9" REAL /* Intensity reading for condition 9 */,
  "intensity_10" REAL /* Intensity reading for condition 10 */,
  "intensity_11" REAL /* Intensity reading for condition 11 */,
  "intensity_12" REAL /* Intensity reading for condition 12 */,
  "reading_accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the intensity reading */,
  "reading_quality" REAL /* Quality score for the intensity reading */,
  "reading_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the intensity reading */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reading_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_intensity_readings_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the researcher */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the researcher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the researcher */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the researcher in the laboratory */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department associated with the researcher */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instruments" (
  "instrument_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each instrument */,
  "instrument_name" TEXT /* Name of the instrument */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the instrument */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the instrument */,
  "last_calibrated" TEXT /* Date of the last calibration */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the instrument (e.g., operational, maintenance) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instrument_id")
)
column_names: Date when the experiment was conducted
ID of the researcher conducting the experiment
Type of treatment applied during the experiment
